title: Getting Quote/Invoice via API
excerpt:
Hey, 
Is it possible to get the Quote/Invoice data using API? 
I’ve tried to query a deal, but there are no associated columns/sub_items for quotes.

posts.author: denlunev (Denis Lunev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
Is it possible to get the Quote/Invoice data using API?

I’ve tried to query a deal, but there are no associated columns/sub_items for quotes.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @denlunev,

Welcome to the community!

Can you explain what you mean by quote/invoice? Which monday product are you referring to? Is it the billing invoice from monday.com or something else?

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: denlunev (Denis Lunev)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rachelatmonday thanks for your reply. I’m referring to quotes that can be attached to CRM deals via templates:

image2896×2232 368 KB

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah I see!

This looks like a case of a CRM-specific feature that isn’t yet supported by the API. I’ve turned your post into a feature request so this can be taken into consideration when creating the roadmap.

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: WebDev (Terra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Rachel.

Are there any updates to the API that would allow this within the CRM product? I have a challenge before me that would require building an integration that creates Invoice records within Monday - populated with data from an external system.
